result:
[[B4]]

to: [hotel manager — name and email]
cc:
subject: Hillside Farm brochure for your guests

Hi [name],

I'm Sam Tan, director of Hillside Farm, a heritage farm at the foothills, about 30 minutes from the the region. We have not met, so forgive the cold note.

Would you be willing to keep a few of our guest brochures at your concierge desk? A lot of the region visitors are after a half-day out in the hinterland, and we are an easy one to send them to: horse riding, animal encounters, a riverside café, and a stretch of the the river full of wild turtles, with something for every age in a family.

If it would help you judge whether it suits your guests, you and your concierge team are welcome to come out as our guests and see the place for yourselves. Either way I can drop brochures in or post them, whichever is easier for you.

Sam
